full_text:
Oulian 區連
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Oulian (區連)was born in Rinan. Possibly non-Chinese. Proclaimed himself King after killing the local magistrate. Paid tribute to Wu. Oulian was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
